zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡上行偏强整理
zh.content:
以太坊当前维持震荡上行结构，价格在1740附近反复整理，多头仍占优势但短线进入高位盘整，市场情绪偏谨慎整体趋势未破坏上升通道等待方向选择信号确认

MACD维持正值6.29附近，短期动能仍偏多，但指标未完全共振，RSI缺失使节奏判断偏震荡整理市场波动收敛多空博弈加剧方向仍待确认阶段

下方支撑关注1727与1733区域，上方阻力在1746，高位突破后或测试1760一线结构仍偏强势整理需观察放量情况确认突破有效性避免假突破风险

操作上建议区间思路为主，回踩1727附近低吸，跌破1725止损，目标看向1755-1760控制仓位与风险适合短线波段交易不追高追涨等待回调确认再介入

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum against the US dollar is trading with a mild bullish bias, holding steady after a small 24-hour gain of 0.46%. Price action remains contained within a tight intraday range between 1733.77 and 1746.49, suggesting short-term consolidation near local highs. Importantly, price is sitting above the 20-day simple moving average at 1727.70, indicating that the broader short-term trend still favors buyers, even as momentum pauses.

Momentum indicators present a cautiously constructive picture. The MACD reading of 6.29429 remains positive, implying underlying bullish pressure; however, the absence of a signal line reading limits confirmation of a fully established crossover structure. With RSI unavailable, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be assessed directly, so price behavior around moving averages becomes more important. The market therefore appears trend-supported but not strongly impulsive at this stage.

Key technical levels show a well-defined short-term structure. Immediate resistance is located at the recent high of 1746.49, with a breakout potentially opening the path toward 1760 and 1785 as next upside targets. On the downside, initial support sits at 1733.77, followed by stronger confluence around the 20-day SMA near 1727.70. A break below this zone would weaken the current bullish structure.

Trading approach favors range-aware positioning with a bullish bias while price holds above the 20-day moving average. Long positions may be considered on dips toward 1733–1728 with confirmation of support, targeting a retest of 1746 and potential extension higher. Alternatively, a clean breakout above 1746.49 could trigger momentum entries. Risk management remains essential, with invalidation below 1727.70. Overall bias remains cautiously bullish in the short term.
